name: Ruflo Security Audit - Elevated Security Pipeline
description: AIDefence multi-layered security audit with STRIDE threat modeling and OWASP compliance

steps: prompt-injection-check (scan auth component for injection vectors)
input-validation (validate API parameters, check path traversal)
static-analysis (SAST scan for CWE matches in auth code)
threat-modeling (STRIDE analysis of authentication attack surface)
compliance-check (OWASP Top 10 verification for auth patterns)
report-generation (executive summary with risk score and remediation plan)
expectedOutcomes.layers: SAST + validation + sanitization + threat modeling + compliance
